projectDescription: A Chinese-language educational series of Jupyter notebooks implementing core reinforcement learning algorithms from scratch, progressing from stateless bandit problems through deep RL methods like DQN, PPO, DDPG, SAC, and multi-agent systems.
keyFeatures: Step-by-step Jupyter notebook implementations of 18 RL topics
Stateless bandit algorithms: Greedy, Decaying Greedy, UCB, Thompson Sampling
Markov Decision Process foundations: Monte Carlo and Bellman Equation
Dynamic programming: Policy Iteration and Value Iteration
Temporal-Difference learning: Sarsa, N-step Sarsa, Q-Learning
Deep Q-Network (DQN) with variants: Double DQN, Dueling DQN
Policy Gradient methods: REINFORCE, Actor-Critic, PPO, TRPO
Advanced topics: Imitation Learning, Offline RL, MPC, MBPO, Goal-conditioned RL, Multi-agent
OpenAI Gym integration with CartPole and Pendulum environments
publicApiSurface: 1.无状态问题 — Greedy, Decaying Greedy, UCB, Thompson Sampling bandit algorithms
2.马尔可夫决策过程 — Monte Carlo method, Bellman equation matrix solver
3.动态规划算法 — Policy Iteration, Value Iteration, FrozenLake demo
4.时序差分算法 — Sarsa, N-step Sarsa, Q-Learning
6.DQN算法 — Single-model DQN, Dual-model DQN (CartPole/Pendulum), Double DQN, Dueling DQN
17.目标导向的强化学习 — Goal-conditioned RL
x1.gym — OpenAI Gym setup and environment walkthrough
